Having The Daily Show and Colbert Report back honestly makes me more productive. I watch 'em when I wake up, puts me in a good mood.

If someone, extremely hypothetically, was like, I will pay you $$$ more a year, but- there is the off chance that due to reasons out of your control, I will be really mad and mean sometimes, I am old enough that the dollar figure for that has dramatically out-paced inflation
Obviously not literally, but also, sometimes very literally
The reason I am not a rich man is because my personality would rather pay a stranger hundreds of dollars than have them be a little mad at / mean to me
